articles.title: Ethereum “Set For Further Gains,” Analyst Puts This Target
articles.description: An analyst has explained that Ethereum could be set to see a further rally based on on-chain data. Here’s the level ETH may end up surpassing. articles.title: Five Bitcoin mining pools dominated 2023 with 84% of total blocks
articles.description: In the span from December 30, 2022, to December 30, 2023, the Bitcoin mining landscape experienced a transformative year marked by significant achievements and industry-leading players. A total of 54,002 bitcoin blocks were mined during this period, with Foundry USA emerging as the top contributor, mining an impressive 16,492 blocks. The mining community navigated through […]
